hero.name: Yong Cheng Low
hero.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
hero.objective: Using modern day technologies to improve the lives of others

timeline.title: Data & Software Engineer at National University Hospital
bullets: Built proof-of-concept AI projects, including a Speech-to-Speech agent for PROMS collection using AWS Nova Sonic 2 and GPT Realtime
Contributed to cluster-level initiatives in automatic speech recognition and medical coding to improve workforce efficiency

Established the office's engineering foundations, including repository setup, CI/CD pipelines, observability stack (OpenTelemetry, Grafana, Prometheus), Helm chart configuration, and internal documentation via Docusaurus

timeline.title: Senior Software Engineer at Glints
bullets: Designed and implemented an automated multilingual resume parsing workflow using OpenAI APIs, achieving over 90% accuracy across all data points
Developed a multilingual job role inference system using open source NLPs from job titles and work experience, attaining over 90% accuracy
Setup of Dashboards and Alerting system to catch and report incidents, system performance and suspicious activities reducing mean time to restore (MTTR) to within 2 hours
Automating workflow processes to increase workplace productivity through Jira, Gitlab, Lark, Anycross for QA, Project Tracking, Code Reviews, Bugs Reporting saving over 150 engineering hours per year
Maintained and improved the Kafka pipelines using Scala to deliver real-time updates to the Elasticsearch index
Worked on the migration of the Managed Talent Platform from Rust to Go and deliver improvements to existing platform features

timeline.title: Web Software Engineer at Glints
bullets: Collaborated with the Product, Designers, and other Engineers to deliver a recruiter-centric product
Translated designs into functional and responsive web applications to ensure a seamless user experience achieving a median CES of 8/10
Ensured the scalability and reliability of the web application by implementing best practices and regularly testing for bugs and issues achieving an uptime of over 99%
Maintained and enhanced the recruiter's search engine by incorporating new features such as boolean search, enabling efficient candidate filtering sourcing 30% of monthly matches

timeline.title: Web Development Teacher at Le Wagon
bullets: Delivered an immersive web development course that equips over 100 beginners and career switches with the skills to become junior software developers
Guided students in building over 25 robust and user-friendly software applications
Achieved a high student satisfaction and completion rate with a NPS score of 82.7

timeline.title: Software Engineer at NCS (IOT Defence)
bullets: Implemented a secure API Gateway for an IoT project, facilitating seamless data transfer between different micro-services using Java Spring Boot
Collaborated on the development of a Screen Lock Mobile Application that allows the mobile phone to have 3FA security through Yubikey, Password and Lockscreen Pattern
Assisted with the frontend development of the web application using Angular to ensure seamless integration of features and optimal user experience

timeline.title: NUS Computer Engineering (Bachelor with Honours)
timeline.description: Graduated NUS Computer Engineering with Honours (Merit). Concentration in Interactive Digital Media, Minor in Interactive Media Development.
bullets: President of NUS Student's Sports Club 39th Management Committee
Vice Project Director of NUS Biathlon 2018
Vice President of Human Resource and Development 19th Management Committee

timeline.title: National Service — Guards Unit
timeline.description: Returned to Singapore alone for National Service. Posted to the Guards unit, which taught me resilience and the spirit of Always Ready, Ready to Strike.
bullets: Guard Unit 16th Mono GPMG Commander
Specialist Command School
BMTC Viper Company
